alerts.title: Spain — Grid Overload Risk
alerts.description: Energy demand exceeds 85% of grid capacity in Barcelona and Valencia regions. Peak tourist season contributing to 12% increase over baseline.

alerts.title: France — Cooling Capacity Critical
alerts.description: Elevated temperatures in Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur region driving cooling demand to record levels for this period.

alerts.title: Italy — Tourism Surge Detected
alerts.description: Week-over-week tourist arrivals up 18% in Rome and Florence. Energy consumption trending above seasonal norms.

alerts.title: Greece — Renewable Dip Expected
alerts.description: Cloud cover forecast suggests 30% reduction in solar generation across Greek islands over next 48 hours.

alerts.title: Germany — Wind Generation Surplus
alerts.description: Offshore wind farms producing 15% above forecast. Grid operators managing excess capacity.

alerts.title: Netherlands — Normal Operations
alerts.description: All monitored metrics within expected ranges. No intervention required.

recommendations.title: Activate Reserve Capacity
recommendations.description: Deploy 15% reserve energy capacity across Spanish and Italian grids to accommodate peak tourist demand over the next 72 hours.
recommendations.impact: Prevents grid overload in 3 critical regions

recommendations.title: Optimize Cooling Schedules
recommendations.description: Shift public building cooling to off-peak hours (22:00–06:00) in southern France and Greece to flatten demand curves.

recommendations.title: Increase Renewable Monitoring
recommendations.description: Deploy additional solar generation monitoring in Greek islands ahead of forecast cloud cover to manage supply expectations.
recommendations.impact: Improves grid stability during renewable dip

recommendations.title: Maintain Current Operations
recommendations.description: Northern and Central European regions require no changes. Continue standard monitoring with weekly reporting cadence.
